Representative_Docs: ["of 7500 if you're in some of the more aggressive states like Georgia or California you're going to get another $5,000 so the car for most people is going to net down in the low 20s so I think it's a very affordable car which helps a lot other cars that are out there The only one that's comparably priced is the Nissan Leaf, and I think they make a great car.", "Navigation with Electric Intelligence adds in those DC fast charging stops to your road trip you can control for example the climate control system and ask it to be in eco or eco plus mode to conserve a little bit of the battery okay you also notice you have some shift paddles on your steering wheel right which we're an electric car so kind of what do you need those for right those actually control your regenerative braking you have a couple different options your first is basically no regenerative braking it's just completely coasting okay You have a very strong regenerative braking option, which kind of feels like the car is coming to a complete stop very quickly.", "Both windows are fully automatic as standard while your electronic door actuator is located on top of the door handle automatically flips up with ease unless the car is idling under gas power while in electric mode if you open up the door and let your foot off the brake the car automatically goes into its accessory power mode similar to the i3 bmw claims the i8 represents the sports car of the future but what does that really mean with the new eco-minded i sub brand the i8 represents the brand's first plug-in hybrid joining the recently launched i3 electric vehicle BMW dove into the hybrid segment a number of years ago, but with this new 2 Plus 2 they've created something different, something much more special."]
